description.value: This is the all codes value set for the RGB Values for Color code system. Valid codes are #RRGGBB where RR, GG, and BB are two letter hex codes, values 00..ff. Codes are case insensitive.

copyright.value: [Copyright](https://www.w3.org/copyright/software-license-2023/) ©2026 World Wide Web Consortium. W3C® liability, trademark and permissive document license rules apply.
